title: Madrobot X
description:
MadRobot X is an old school shoot 'em up game. You control a robot trying to escape from the laboratory of a mad scientist, and to accomplish this, you'll need the help of GoboGobo, another robot who also wants to escape. The task is not easy; the mad scientist will do anything to prevent anyone from escaping.Features• Pixel art style

• Progressive challenge

• Power ups

• Special skills

• 12 Bosses

• Bullets, bullets, bullets!

• Nightmare Mode

• Gameservices Scoreboard

• Gamepad support with 2 modes:
 * Normal: LStick moves the robot, RStick shoots and maneuvers the beam
 * Classic: LStick moves the robot and maneuvers the beam, buttons shoot

• Gameplay adjustments (hitbox, touchscreen, hp recovery, etc...)

• The ability to mute, not only the music, but sound effects as well

• And much more (like bullets!)
description_short: MadRobot X is an old school shoot 'em up game. You control a robot trying to escape from the laboratory of a mad scientist, and to accomplish this, you'll need the help of GoboGobo, another robot who also wants to escape.
